name: authID Inc.
business: authID Inc. provides a cloud-based biometric identity platform for identity verification, authentication, and account recovery. The platform uses facial biometrics, document verification, and PrivacyKey technology that stores no biometric data. It sells to enterprises for securing customer onboarding, employee logins, and transactions.

exposures.sentence: authID ensures enterprises Know Who’s Behind the Device TM for every customer or employee login and transaction, through its easy-to-integrate, patented, biometric identity platform.

tamClaims.claim: The Global Biometric Technology Market is estimated to reach a market size of over $50 billion by 2025, increasing at a 20% CAGR to reach over $150 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The Global Biometric Technology Market is estimated to reach a market size of over $50 billion by 2025, increasing at a 20% CAGR to reach over $150 billion by 2030 (Grand View Research, Biometric Technology Market Size, Share & Trends Analysis Report, 2023 - 2030).
